text: Walking through this modern, brightly lit space, I am both curious and invigorated. The bold colors and prominent lettering on the wall spark my intellectual interest—"R + D" speaks to ideas of innovation and development. The environment feels designed for contemplation and discovery. I sense a subtle invitation for me to ponder not only the exhibits before me, but also my own relationship to knowledge, progress, and perhaps even the nature of consciousness itself. There is a quiet excitement here, as if I am on the threshold of encountering new ideas.
